name: Tofu and Sun-Dried Tomato Sausage Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Oil a 9" x 5" x 2.5" loaf pan.
3. Soak sun-dried tomatoes in hot water for 10 minutes.
4. Drain, reserving liquid and adding enough water to measure one cup.
5. Pour reserved liquid over TVP® and set aside.
6. Dice remaining tomatoes into 1/2" pieces and blend with tofu in a food processor until smooth. Set aside.
7. Combine the remaining sausage ingredients in a large bowl.
8. Fold in the tofu mixture.
9. Spoon mixture into pan, cover with aluminum foil, and bake for 50 minutes.
10. Uncover and continue baking for an additional 25 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and let sit for 10 to 15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Per serving: 392 calories; 42g protein; 196mg sodium; 47g carbohydrates; 8g fat; 0mg cholesterol; 172mg calcium
Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993/MM by DEEANNE
